title: Sqlitelogictest wrong result set generated from complex case statement
poc: SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN + CASE + - COUNT ( * ) WHEN - 10 THEN NULL WHEN + - 23 - 53 THEN ( COUNT ( DISTINCT + ( + 21 ) ) ) * 72 + COALESCE ( + + 45, 9 ) WHEN - 40 + - 7 + - 1 THEN NULL END NOT IN ( + 14 + + 18 ) THEN NULL ELSE ( - - 46 ) END;
key_bug_features: Complex case statement with nested COUNT and COALESCE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT, description VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 10, 'Test case 1'), (2, 20, 'Test case 2'), (3, NULL, 'Test case 3');
SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN COALESCE(SUM(value), 0) ELSE NULL END AS result FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS null_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS not_null_count FROM test_table;
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT description) FROM test_table) ELSE 0 END AS distinct_descriptions FROM test_table;
